top_signals.title: Korea to Monitor $37 Billion of Overseas Private Credit Exposure
top_signals.summary: South Korea will monitor overseas private debt investments from the nation that total some $37 billion, the government said, following recent scares in the industry globally.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
